ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN of the book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "sales_rank" INTEGER /* Sales rank of the book */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the book */,
  "avg_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the book */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the book */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the book */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the book */,
  "num_pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the book (e.g., hardcover, paperback, e-book) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_categories" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "author_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the author */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the author (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_authors" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "author_role" TEXT /* Role of the author (e.g., writer, editor, translator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_metrics" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "degree_centrality" REAL /* Degree centrality of the book */,
  "clustering_coefficient" REAL /* Clustering coefficient of the book */,
  "betweenness_centrality" REAL /* Betweenness centrality of the book */,
  "closeness_centrality" REAL /* Closeness centrality of the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being reviewed */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "searches" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the search */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Text of the search query */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date the search was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_searches_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user interacting with the database */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., search, download, update) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details of the action (e.g., search query, downloaded book) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the downloaded book */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who downloaded the book */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date the book was downloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_downloads_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

Format of the book (e.g., hardcover, paperback, e-book)
Death date of the author (if applicable)
Role of the author (e.g., writer, editor, translator)
